**Pillar:** [P / E / C / M / A]

**Type:** [KBA Question / PPA Task]

**Difficulty:** [1=Easy / 2=Medium / 3=Hard]

**Content:**
```yaml
# Paste your question/task YAML here
# Follow the format in docs/contributing-questions.md
```

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Follows YAML format from existing examples
- [ ] Has exactly one correct answer (MCQ) or defined correct set
- [ ] Distractors are plausible
- [ ] Question is model-agnostic
- [ ] Includes explanation
- [ ] Includes tags
